narrative:
Precinct East Bloom Township (precinct in Morgan County) has 476 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.7 percentage points.
